summary: A clip of a televised news conference, presented as a Fox News broadcast. A woman in a dark blazer stands at a microphone speaking, with two other women on either side of her, one holding a framed photograph. A backdrop behind them references a crime engagement program and a toll-free voice hotline. On-screen graphics include 'ICE HEADQUARTERS WASHINGTON', a 'LIVE' clock, a 'BREAKING NEWS' banner and a chyron about families speaking at an ICE news conference.

script.scene: A woman at a microphone speaks; chyron reads 'NOW: FAMILIES OF ILLEGAL IMMIGRANT CRIME SPEAK AT ICE NEWS CONFERENCE'; 'ICE HEADQUARTERS WASHINGTON' label at upper left.
The same speaker continues, head lowered reading; chyron now reads 'ANGEL FAMILIES SHARE EMOTIONAL STORIES OF LOVED ONES KILLED BY ILLEGAL IMMIGRANTS'.

notable_text: ICE HEADQUARTERS WASHINGTON; BREAKING NEWS; FAMILIES OF ILLEGAL IMMIGRANT CRIME SPEAK AT ICE NEWS CONFERENCE; FOX NEWS ALERT
